Author: XeldarAlz
Name: Doman Mahjong Solver
Punchline: Doman Mahjong helper — hints or auto-play.
Description: A helper for Doman Mahjong. Shows you hints or plays it for you.
Changelog: v0.1.0.12 — Telemetry visibility pass (no user-facing functional changes). Every dispatch now self-reports whether the click actually committed: new `dispatch_outcome` finding fires per dispatch with `commit=true/false` after observing whether (state, hand, melds) advanced within ~500 ms. New `stuck_state` finding fires once when the bot has been at the same (state, hand, legal) tuple for 10+ seconds with no commits — makes the post-MinKan / post-2nd-pon stalls corpus-detectable instead of user-report-driven. Games-stream `state` events now include the raw addon `state_code` (6/15/28/30 etc.), letting analyzers distinguish dispatch contexts the `legal` enum can't. `dispatch_attempted` findings carry `cur_state`/`cur_hand`/`cur_melds`/`cur_legal` so the dispatcher's snapshot view is recoverable from the corpus alone. `decision` events carry MeldTracker state (`melds`, `deferred_ticks`, `pending_seat`, `meld_akadora`) so chi/pon race regressions are diagnosable without local dalamud.log. New `tools/cleanup-local-corpus.mjs` ages out telemetry pulls older than N days (default 7, dry-run by default). The class of bug 'FireCallback returns Ok but tile doesn't leave hand' that masked the discard handshake gap for 13 months is now corpus-detectable.
